excluded_item: ABC without parent/context as strong correction
reason: A clean 0-A-B-C can be an impulse/subimpulse if it does not correct a known movement.
Zigzag, flat, triangle, combination and alternation are not implemented rigorously yet.
WaveCount is still visual/structural context, not a strategy.
Too much microstructure and lateral noise relative to H4/D1.
Context can help but must not rescue bad counts or reject valid transitions.
